summary: Solid show with high energy first set and standout Ship of Fools, Truckin' > Spoonful mash, but recording source and sound quality are not documented.
review: The reviewer rates the concert a solid 4‑star performance, praising an energetic first set, Jerry Garcia’s “on” playing, a superb rendition of Ship of Fools, and an inspired Truckin' > Spoonful mash highlighted by a great Brent B3 solo. No details are given about the recording source or audio fidelity, so the technical quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review emphasizes strong musical performance; no recording details to adjust rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic first set with fast playing; second set starts slowly but gains momentum after Ship of Fools, leading into a lively Truckin' > Spoonful mash and an enjoyable Space.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as "on" with great licks throughout the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Nice Brent B3 solo, praised as "one hell of a player."
